title: To-mara
content:
{{Top|leg}}
"'''To-mara'''" was the name conveyed to those [[Yevetha]] who were dishonored, and translated into [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] as "shamed one." These Yevetha were those who were considered unworthy of the gift of [[Death/Legends|death]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]''

[[Category:Yevethan titles]]
